title: Teaspoons, Funnydin 36 Pieces Tea Spoons Set, 5.9 Inch, Spoons Cutlery for Tea, Coffee, Cake, Dessert & Salad, Dishwasher Safe, Cutlery Starter Spoons, Dessert Spoon, Tea Spoon for Restaurant
features: 【Good Value】This teaspoons set has 36 pieces, which is more quantity than 12 regular tea spoons on the market, and the price is more affordable. This spoons set is a great choice for restaurants if you want to reduce operating costs.

【High Quality & Dishwasher Safe】The dessert spoons is made of high-quality stainless steel and fully complies with food-grade safety standards, which is also anti-corrosion and anti-rust. Most importantly, the teaspoons set is easy to clean and dishwasher safe.

【Ergonomic Design】These spoons cutlery are designed with many practical ideas such as proper weight and ergonomic handle. It's not too heavy for a kid to hold. Meanwhile, it has a certain amount of weight to maintain its good durability. The curve of spoons handle is designed according to the posture of the hand, which ensure maximum comfort during use and prevent you from getting tired.

【Multi-multipurpose Cutlery Spoons】The tea spoons is multipurpose and can be used as tea spoons, coffee spoons, latte spoons, dessert spoons and so on. Hence it is one of the must-have cutlery in restaurants, bistros, cafes, roadside cottages and hotels.

【Funnydin’s Promise】Funnydin's business philosophy is to provide customers with a satisfactory shopping experience with high-quality spoon set and nice-value. If you have any dissatisfaction, please feel free to contact us. We are looking forward to your feedback and make improvements immediately.

Features： -Set of 36 -Size: 5.9 Inch -Material: 18/0 Stainless Steel -Elegant And Classics Design -Mirror Polished Finish -Ergonomic Handle -Dishwasher Safe The cost-effective teaspoon set The classic multi-piece design makes this teaspoon set more cost-effective. The 36 pieces spoons can meet almost all multi-person use scenarios. Thanks to the classic design, it will be a nice replenish when one of your cutlery unfortunately loses the spoons. For more cutlery set, please go to Funnydin Store. Funnydin has always been committed to providing more cost-effective cutlery, and we will focus more on developing better cutlery set that is more suitable for life. Thank you for choosing Funnydin. Simple & Clean Look No complicated handle decoration, elegant and simple design favored by most people. And it match any style of your cutlery. Mirror Polish The teaspoon set is mirror polished to make sure no rough spot to hurt your mouth. Not need re-polishing and stay shining, easy to care and dishwasher safe. Healthy & Durability Our spoon set is heavy duty not flimsy, high hardness, no distortion, durable construction make sure that it can be used for years. Warm Tips: 1、Please wash the cutlery before first use to make sure no manufacturing residue. 2、Please clean the flatware set after using and dry the pieces for their durability. 3、Please do not use iron wire to scratch the pieces to keep their smooth surface. 4、The cutlery set is Dishwasher Safe so you can clean it in dishwasher to save your time. 5、For safety, please let your young kid use this silverware set when accompanied by an adult.
